name: tack-cli
description: Accurate project memory for coding agents, kept in sync with the codebase.

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test tests/agentTemplates.test.js tests/cli-default-command.test.js tests/cli-context.test.js tests/cli-animations.test.js tests/cli-setup-agent.test.js tests/git-changed-files.test.js tests/watch-runtime.test.js tests/logger-mcp.test.js tests/ndjson-tail.test.js
scripts.test:trust-loop: npm run build && node --test tests/git-changed-files.test.js tests/watch-runtime.test.js tests/logger-mcp.test.js tests/ndjson-tail.test.js
scripts.dev: npm run build && node dist/index.js watch --plain
scripts.build:bun: bun build src/index.tsx --outdir dist --target node && node scripts/postbuild.cjs
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run test && npm run test:publish
